payload.label: window
payload.long_description: Tall rectangular interior window fully covered by closed white horizontal blinds (plastic/vinyl slats) with narrow light gaps between slats and dark curtain panels visible at the sides; bottom-right of the crop shows adjacent wooden furniture — approximately 2.5 meters from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"window","short_description":"tall window with white blinds","long_description":"Tall rectangular interior window fully covered by closed white horizontal blinds (plastic/vinyl slats) with narrow light gaps between slats and dark curtain panels visible at the sides; bottom-right of the crop shows adjacent wooden furniture — approximately 2.5 meters from the camera.","attributes":["white horizontal blinds","closed slats","plastic/vinyl slats","tall rectangular frame","dark side curtains","narrow light gaps between slats","adjacent wooden furniture visible (bottom-right)"],"distance_from_camera_m":2.5}
